_comment: AIFlow projekt — autonom session-close: ha tesztek PASS es nincs STOP-feltetel, a Claude commit + NEXT.md generalast user kerdes nelkul vegrehajtja.

hooks.command: echo '=== AIFlow Session Start ===' && git branch --show-current && echo '---' && if [ -f session_prompts/NEXT.md ]; then echo ''; echo 'KOVETKEZO SESSION PROMPT ELERHETO!'; echo '  Ird: /next — es a session automatikusan indul'; echo '---'; head -5 session_prompts/NEXT.md; else echo 'Nincs session_prompts/NEXT.md — hasznald: /status'; fi

echo {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Credentials/secrets/key fajl irasa tiltott — hasznalj environment variable-t vagy Vault-ot"}}
echo {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Force push tiltott — hasznalj normal push-t vagy kerj explicit engedelyt"}}
echo {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"git reset --hard tiltott — hasznalj git stash-t vagy kerj explicit engedelyt"}}

.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m ruff check src/ tests/ --quiet && .venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/ -x --tb=line -q 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"lint+unit PASS"}}' || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"COMMIT BLOKKOLVA: lint vagy unit teszt FAIL — javitsd elobb!"}}'
echo 'WARN: Alembic migration modositva — futtasd: PYTHONPATH=src alembic upgrade head && alembic check'

if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo ''; echo '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'; echo 'UNCOMMITTED CHANGES — futtasd: /session-close [ID]'; echo '  → autonom: ha tesztek PASS, commit + NEXT.md user kerdes nelkul'; echo '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'; fi

if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -qiE '(password|api.?key|private.?key|BEGIN.?RSA|aiflow_sk_[a-z0-9]{8})'; then echo '{"message": "FIGYELEM: A prompt erzekeny adatot tartalmazhat. Biztos, hogy tesztadatokkal dolgozol?"}'; fi
